text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond seems unusually nervous before
the Kyoto Daishoten, but she claims she's fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says the reason her running has been off is
because she's been feeling obligated to run like
an illustrious runner would.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, becoming an illustrious runner is her
own dream. That acknowledgement reminds her
of the joy of running for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond promises to run her own way and
heads off for the race.
